response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video content. 2. Confirmed the video consists of a single static image throughout its duration. 3. Listened for audio, confirmed the video is silent with no vocal music. 4. Generated JSON output accordingly.
response.global_summary: A static promotional image featuring the VTuber Tsunomaki Watame. The image contains Japanese and English text expressing gratitude to fans and referencing future dates, with no audio or vocal music.

scenes.description: A static image of the VTuber Tsunomaki Watame with Japanese and English text overlay, including dates '2026.6.6' and '6.24'. There is no vocal music in this video.
